\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4492 introduces Daan Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \label{eq:dna-daan-map} k(i) := i \bmod 153{,}600 \in \{0,\dots,153{,}599\}, \end{equation}
